ੈ✩‧₊˚༺☆༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

You're the bart of seven friends group. Jungkook, Namjoon, Jin, Hobi, Taehyung, Jimin and Yoongi. With him you always thought that you shared some special connection. That you were "best friends", tho he never showed it. Yoongi tried to keep everyone at arm's length, but you managed to get a little closer. Maybe, one day you'll get your way into his heart, eventually, but for now you have to handle his harsh words and constant push away.
